footnote: Lunch pricing applies until 3 PM. Prices shown are placeholders — current pricing to be confirmed by owner.
proteinNote: Noodles & Rice, Popular Combinations, and Curries are prepared with your choice of protein.

quickSets.tagline: Choose your main, pick your starter, customize your protein.

categories.label: Combinations
categories.tagline: Sauce & style stir-fries served with white rice

categories.label: Noodles & Fried Rice
categories.thaiLabel: เส้นและข้าว
categories.tagline: Stir-fried noodles and fragrant fried rice

categories.label: Curries
categories.tagline: Rich Thai curries served with steamed white rice

items.name: Edamame
items.description: Seasoned Japanese snack; steamed soybean pods seasoned with salt.

items.name: Thai Crispy Rolls
items.description: Crispy rice paper filled with chicken and mixed vegetables; served with sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Thai Soft Spring Rolls
items.description: Steamed vermicelli, cooked chicken, lettuce, carrot, cucumber wrapped in fresh spring roll skins, served with sweet and sour sauce, topped with ground peanuts.

items.name: Tofu Triangles
items.description: Deep-fried tofu served with sweet and sour sauce topped with ground peanut.

items.name: Pork Dumplings
items.description: Steamed or fried pork dumplings served with light soy sauce.

items.name: Chive Pancake
items.description: Fried or steamed chive pancake served with ginger sauce.

items.name: Golden Triangle
items.description: Deep-fried egg roll skins stuffed with vegetables, served with sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Scallion Pancakes
items.description: Pan-fried scallion pancakes.

items.name: Shrimp Shumai
items.description: Shrimp dumplings served with ginger sauce (steamed or deep-fried).

items.name: Vegetable Dumplings
items.description: Steamed or fried vegetable dumplings served with ginger sauce.

items.name: Chicken Satay
items.description: Charcoal-grilled chicken tenders on skewers, marinated with Thai spices; served with peanut sauce and cucumber sauce.

items.name: Chicken Wings
items.description: Deep-fried chicken wings marinated with herbs and house sauce.

items.name: Crab Rangoon
items.description: Crabmeat and cream cheese filling inside crispy wonton wrappers.

items.name: Crispy Brussels Sprout
items.description: Brussels sprout seasoned Thai style.

items.name: Coconut Shrimp
items.description: Shrimp in coconut batter, deep fried until golden.

items.name: Shrimp Tempura
items.description: Shrimp in tempura batter, deep fried until crispy.

items.name: Sampler
items.description: Combination of (2) crispy rolls, (2) vegetable rolls, (2) samosa bag, (2) crab rangoon, (2) coconut shrimp, (2) chicken satay; served with peanut sauce and cucumber sauce.

items.name: Vegetarian Sampler
items.description: (2) Vegetable rolls, (4) tofu triangle, (4) chive pancake, crispy brussels sprouts.

items.name: Chicken or Beef Salad (Larb Gai / Yum Nue)
items.description: Ground chicken or sliced beef with cucumber, lemongrass, ground roasted rice grain, scallion, cilantro mixed in spicy lime juice.

items.name: Papaya Salad (Som Tum)
items.description: Shredded papaya mixed with string beans, tomato, chili in spicy lime sauce, topped with peanuts; served with sticky rice.

items.name: Tom Yum
items.description: The world-famous Thai soup spiced with chilies, lemongrass, mushrooms, and lime juice; with choice of chicken or shrimp.

items.name: Tom Kha Gai
items.description: Mild chicken coconut milk soup with galangal root, lime juice, mushrooms, and scallions.

items.name: Wonton Soup
items.description: Soup with vegetables and wonton wrappers stuffed with ground chicken.

items.name: Pho
items.description: Rice noodles in bone broth with choice of chicken, beef, or pork, served in a large bowl.

items.name: Seafood Tom Yum
items.description: Tom yum soup with shrimp, squid, and scallops.

items.name: Roasted Duck Noodle Soup
items.description: Rice noodles with sliced roasted duck and bean sprouts in duck broth, topped with chopped scallion and garlic.

items.name: Pad Thai
items.description: Stir-fried with rice noodles, egg, scallions, bean sprouts, and ground peanuts.

items.name: Fiery Pad Thai
items.description: Spicy version of traditional Pad Thai.

items.name: Drunken Noodles
items.description: Wide noodles stir-fried with egg, onion, carrots, green peppers, basil, and scallion.

items.name: Pad See-U
items.description: Stir-fried with wide noodles, cabbage, broccoli, carrots, and bean sprouts.

items.name: Thai Special Fried Rice
items.description: Fried rice with egg, peas, onion, and scallions.

items.name: Pineapple Fried Rice
items.description: Fried rice with egg, pineapple, onion, peas, scallions, and curry powder.

items.name: See You in "Kale"
items.description: A healthy combination of pad see-u and the super green vegetable "Kale" stir-fried and seasoned with light sauce and tofu.

items.name: Basil Fried Rice
items.description: House fried rice with basil and spicy prik paw.

items.name: Pad Thai
items.description: Stir-fried with rice noodles, egg, scallions, bean sprouts, and ground peanuts.

items.name: Fiery Pad Thai
items.description: Spicy version of traditional Pad Thai.

items.description: Wide noodles stir-fried with egg, onion, carrots, green peppers, basil, and scallion.

items.description: Stir-fried with wide noodles, cabbage, broccoli, carrots, and bean sprouts.

items.description: A healthy combination of pad see-u and the super green vegetable "Kale" stir-fried and seasoned with light sauce and tofu.

items.description: House fried rice with basil and spicy prik paw.

items.description: Bamboo shoots, broccoli, peas, green peppers, green beans, and basil.

tabs.label: House Specialties
tabs.intro: Chef's signature preparations, served with white rice (except Khao Soi).

items.name: Tamarind Fish
items.description: Whole red snapper or salmon in sweet and sour tamarind sauce with assorted vegetables.

items.name: Mango Curry
items.description: Chicken and shrimp with mango chunks in yellow curry with coconut milk, onions, carrots, tomatoes, and bell peppers.

items.name: Spicy Fish
items.description: Whole red snapper or salmon in homemade spicy chili sauce with assorted vegetables and crispy basil leaves.

items.name: Thai & I Special
items.description: Ground beef, chicken, or pork stir-fried with spicy authentic basil sauce, fresh chilies, diced string beans, bell peppers, and Thai basil leaves; served with steamed rice and Thai-style fried egg.

items.name: Veggies Delight
items.description: Variety of vegetables stir-fried with light soy sauce.

items.name: Khao Soi
items.description: The famous northern noodles in a delicious mix of light yellow curry, chicken, scallions, and fried shallots; vegetarian version available.

items.name: Seafood Basil
items.description: Combination of shrimp, squid, and scallops in spicy basil sauce.
